---
title: "Margaret Yonge"
---

## Margaret Yonge

**Dates:** (d. 22 April 1867)

**Maiden name:** (Crawley)

### Description

cousin and aunt by marriage of CMY

### Biography

She married (1820) her cousin Dr. James Yonge.  She was the daughter of Sir Thomas Crawley-Boevey, 2nd Bt..  Her three children all died in 1830, after which she never left the house except for church. [In the census returns she is 45 in 1841 and 62 in 1851??]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
